_comment: Stage-0 corpus CONTENT config (PREREG_THEME_GENERATION_STUB Stage 0; overlaps PREREG_UNIVERSE_CURATION §4). The per-theme map from a theme to the corpus PULLS that feed it — the inputs corpus/assemble.assemble_corpus reads. Theme keys mirror config.universe.themes (the loop-facing baskets); ETF sources mirror universe_register.json (the curation Rule-0 register's named sources). The §2 prohibition (no prices/IV/momentum/sentiment) is the ADAPTERS' job, enforced by the package import guard; this layer only ROUTES which structural pull feeds which theme. Read by corpus/content.py only; NOT loaded by the trading loop. INERT until the Stage-1 assembler/generator wires it (July-gated). Additive — extend per-theme pulls freely (config over code). All pinned identifiers verified live 2026-06-17 (USASpending naics filter, EIA routes, BLS series, stockanalysis ETFs, NRC list).

themes._extension_slots: Per-theme pulls are additive. Future verified adds, e.g.: copper_supply.bls (metals PPI), nuclear_fuel.bls (utilities/extraction employment), per-theme eia facets. Add only verified identifiers.
